name: Georgia Power Company Series 2017A 5.00% Junior Subordinated Notes due October 1 2077
summary: Georgia Power Company Series 2017A 5.00% Junior Subordinated Notes due October 1 2077 represents debt securities issued by Georgia Power Company, a utility company. These notes have a fixed interest rate of 5.00% and are due in 2077. Georgia Power is headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia.
